title: Record a valid single expense with custom date
objective: Verify that a user can save an expense with a custom date and it appears correctly in the timeline

steps.expected_result: Entry sheet opens; Date field is pre-filled with Today's date/time

steps.step: Select type = Expense, enter amount = 50, select Category = 'Food', select Account = 'Bank'

steps.expected_result: Selected date is displayed in the UI
Sheet closes and a new expense row appears in the Timeline under 'Yesterday'
Bank account current balance has decreased by 50
